steps.t: Wharf master Annúngil has asked you to replace the damaged ropes and pins on the Rosigil. You should pick up the box of pins and bundles of new rope. …
You are now armed with fresh pins and tightly woven ropes. You should replace the pins on the Rosigil and the rope on the docks. The Rosigil is moored…
You should let Annúngil know that you have replaced the damaged pins and piles of rope on the Rosigil. The wharf master is on a dock in the Dol Amroth…
